summary: Iteration 97: All bug fixes verified. Floating Contact Button correctly hidden on /mira page, Member Dashboard 'All Services' tab displays all 14 pillars, Mira session endpoint returns messages array, Product Box PUT endpoint accepts image_url field.

floating_button_hidden_on_mira.details: FloatingContactButton correctly returns null on /mira page due to hiddenPaths check

floating_button_visible_on_homepage.details: FloatingContactButton visible on homepage with 'Speak to us!' tooltip

member_dashboard_all_services_tab.details: All Services tab exists in Member Dashboard with all 14 pillars displayed: Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Paperwork, Advisory, Emergency, Farewell, Adopt, Shop

mira_session_endpoint.details: GET /api/mira/session/{session_id} returns messages array at root level with proper sender/content structure

product_box_image_url.details: PUT /api/product-box/products/{id} accepts and saves image_url field correctly

member_login.details: Member login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 works correctly, redirects to /dashboard

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed products for testing Product Box image_url
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 97 verified all reported bug fixes: 1) FloatingContactButton hidden on /mira and /ask-mira pages via hiddenPaths array check, 2) Member Dashboard has 'All Services' tab showing all 14 pillars with icons and descriptions, 3) Mira session endpoint returns messages array at root level for frontend consumption, 4) Product Box PUT endpoint accepts image_url field. All backend tests pass (13/13). Member login works with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123.

member_dashboard_all_services.details: Tab shows all 14 pillars: Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Paperwork, Advisory, Emergency, Farewell, Adopt, Shop

mira_session_messages.details: GET /api/mira/session/{session_id} returns {session_id, ticket_id, pillar, created_at, messages: [...], ticket: {...}}

product_box_image_url.details: UnifiedProduct model includes image_url field, PUT endpoint saves it correctly
